sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lamdang Jesuh hehpihna’n, ka mawhna sel khin maw;
Bangci bangin ka leii in, phat khinzo
Ka lungkhamna teng beisak, keimah hong khah khiazo;

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Teh theilo hi, Jesuh’ hehpih, lamdang hong
Tuipi thuk pen sangin thukzaw, mual sangin sangzaw;
Lamdang hehpihna kicing kei aa kei
Ka mawhna teng khempeuh sangin lianzaw,
Ka zumna teng sangin zong lianzaw,
manpha mahmah Jesuh’ min lian phat un, phat ciat un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong piak mawh maisakna in, tawntung ading cing hi;

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lamdang Jesuh hehpihna’n, a sia bel zong honkhia;
kei hong khel, A Tapa za hong pia;
Vantung nopsakna khempeuh, ei adingin leizo;
